name: Production Pro Commercial 8.3
description: Standard HP PrintOS Production Pro Commercial 8.3 installation or upgrade flow. The Production Pro installers are responsible for detecting whether the server is a clean installation or an upgrade scenario.

unsupportedConditions.message: Production Pro 8.x is not supported to drive Series 2 presses. Stop the installation and contact the appropriate HP support resources.

steps.name: Validate hardware
steps.notes: Validate supported DFE hardware before starting the Production Pro 8.3 procedure. This read-only validation uses the approved hardware requirements manifest.

steps.name: BIOS, network and hosts configuration
steps.notes: Validate BIOS-related assumptions, network adapter inventory and hosts file requirements in read-only mode. No network settings or hosts file entries are modified.

steps.name: WSUS
steps.notes: Manually complete or confirm the WSUS-related step required by the Production Pro 8.3 procedure. This step is intentionally manual until an approved WSUS validation or action script is defined.

steps.name: Win10Opt
steps.notes: Manually complete or confirm the Windows optimization step before prerequisites. This step is intentionally manual until an approved Win10Opt validation or action script is defined.

steps.name: Validate Production Pro 8.3 prerequisites package
steps.notes: Validate prerequisites package metadata, Azure access and existing local cache integrity. Development mode must not execute the installer and should not introduce a new automatic download decision during this conservative migration.

steps.name: Install Production Pro Commercial 8.3 software
steps.notes: Run the Production Pro Commercial 8.3 software installer. The installer determines whether the environment is new or upgrade.

steps.name: Licenses
steps.notes: Confirm required licenses are available and applied according to the installation guide.

steps.name: Validation checkpoint after licenses
steps.notes: Run or confirm validation checkpoint after licensing.

steps.name: Clean BK
steps.notes: Clean BK remains pending confirmation of the exact approved script or procedure.

steps.name: Map press with IPC
steps.notes: Map the press with IPC according to the installation guide.

steps.name: Open CEP
steps.notes: Complete or confirm the CEP step.

steps.name: DGC
steps.notes: Complete or confirm DGC procedure.

steps.name: Radar Update
steps.notes: Complete or confirm Radar Update procedure.

steps.name: Install latest approved Production Pro 8.3 update
steps.notes: Install the latest approved update package for Commercial 8.3. For the current MVP this is UP3iF.

steps.name: Install approved fixes and optimizers
steps.notes: Install all approved non-cumulative fixes applicable to Commercial 8.3, in the approved order. This step will become package-driven after fix metadata is finalized.

steps.name: Validation checkpoint after updates
steps.notes: Run validation after update packages and fixes.

steps.name: Process demo job
steps.notes: Process a demo job as functional validation.

steps.name: iServer connection
steps.notes: Confirm iServer connection.

steps.name: PrintOS connection
steps.notes: Confirm PrintOS connection.

steps.name: SPM Drivers / iProfiler
steps.notes: Complete or confirm SPM Drivers and iProfiler requirements.

steps.name: Remote support / Assessment / RSC
steps.notes: Complete remote support, assessment and RSC-related closure steps.
